idea-plugin.name: kimijb
idea-plugin.description:
Run kimi-cli directly inside GoLand with an embedded interactive terminal.

  • Provides a dedicated Kimi tool window for daily coding workflows.
  • Supports Option+K (macOS) to inject filePath:lineNumber from the active editor.
  • Uses PTY-based terminal integration for reliable Enter/Backspace and interactive behavior.

Requirements: local kimi-cli installation (for example, kimi --version works in your shell).

Compatibility: JetBrains 2024.3+ (GoLand-focused).

action.description: Insert current file path and cursor line into Kimi panel
